chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-343 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.1572/2026. 2. For orders on Office Objection No.1 & 2. 3. For orders on Misc. No.1573/2026. 4. For orders on Misc. No.1574/2026. 5. For hearing of main case. 28.01.2026. Mr. Abrar Raza Ghumro, Advocate for the Petitioner. ------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-5. After making certain preliminary submissions, learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petition is not being pressed any further, as the Petitioner would make an appropriate Application before the Provincial Ombudsman for joining the proceedings emanating from the Complaint made by the Respondent No.1 against the Respondents Nos.2 and 3. The Petition stands dismissed accordingly alongwith other pending Miscellaneous Applications. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
